bugReports.summary: Contact Form issue: Contact form can be submitted with valid data
bugReports.description: During automated validation of "Contact Form - Contact form can be submitted with valid data", the system encountered a blocker that prevented expected user behavior.
stepsToReproduce: Execute scenario: Contact Form - Contact form can be submitted with valid data
Observe behavior and compare with expected journey outcome.
bugReports.expectedResult: User should be able to complete the intended flow without blockers.
bugReports.actualResult: Site console error detected: intlTelInput is not loaded.
bugReports.suggestedFix: Inspect failing module logic and stabilize related frontend/backend dependencies.
bugReports.businessImpact: Feature quality degradation may increase support overhead.
bugReports.userImpact: Some users face interruptions or degraded usability.
bugReports.revenueImpact: Indirect or partial revenue impact is possible depending on traffic mix.

bugReports.rootCauseAnalysis: Frontend runtime errors were detected and likely caused interaction instability.
